findings.title: 5 endpoints missing auth middleware
findings.body: Routes /api/users, /api/orders, /api/reports, /api/admin/* are registered without the auth() middleware. Any unauthenticated client can read or mutate these resources.
findings.fix: Wrap the route group in Route::middleware(['auth:sanctum'])->group(...) or attach ->middleware('auth') per route.

findings.title: JSON validation missing $request->validate()
findings.body: Controller reads $request->all() into the model without validation. Convention in this project uses $request->validate([...]) before persistence.

findings.title: request() global vs constructor inject
findings.body: Service uses the global request() helper inside a domain method. This couples business logic to HTTP context and breaks unit testing.
findings.fix: Inject Request via constructor or pass needed fields as method parameters.

findings.title: COALESCE(NULLIF()) loses index usage
findings.body: Wrapping the indexed column 'email' in COALESCE(NULLIF(...)) forces a full table scan. EXPLAIN shows seq_scan instead of idx_customers_email.
findings.fix: Rewrite as: WHERE (email = :q AND email IS NOT NULL) OR (alt_email = :q). Then both branches can hit their indexes.
findings.code_snippet:
SELECT id, name, email
FROM customers
WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(email, ''), alt_email) = :q
LIMIT 50;

findings.title: Typo in docblock + missing newline at EOF
findings.body: Docblock says 'Invioce' instead of 'Invoice'. File also missing trailing newline at EOF.
findings.fix: Fix typo. Add newline at end of file.
